name: Oriental Marinated Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place the thawed steaks into the marinade.
3. Marinate in the refrigerator for 2-3 hours, turning occasionally.
4. Remove the steaks from the marinade and place them on a preheated grill over medium heat.
5. Cook for approximately 7-9 minutes for a medium-rare steak.
6. Turn off the grill when done.
